title: Honi
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Honi |homeworld= |birth=c. [[47 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]]Honi is said to be nearly three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old in ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'', which is set in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]] according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', which equates her [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] year to around [[47 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]]. |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Ali-Alann]] ([[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan instructor]]) |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What's your name?''"
"''Honi. I'm almost three.''"
"''Well, Honi-who-is-almost-three, hang on to me.|Obi-Wan Kenobi and Honi|}} '''Honi''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived during the last [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Recruited into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] before the age of three, she [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] as an [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. That year, Honi and her [[Unidentified Jedi clan|Initiate clan]] got into a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] accident arranged by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] as a part of his [[Incident at the Jedi Temple|plot]] to destroy the Temple. Honi and her peers were saved thanks to the timely actions of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bant Eerin/Legends|Bant Eerin]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|You did well, children. The Force was with you.''"
"''And Ali-Alann was there, too. He told us stories.|Mace Windu and Honi, following Honi's rescue from the turbolift|}} [[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] around [[47 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]], Honi was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] whose [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]] was detected at an early age, which led to her acceptance into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as an [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]]. She began [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Honi was sorted into a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] with nine other Initiates under the stewardship of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ali-Alann]]. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], when Honi was nearly three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, [[Unidentified Jedi clan|her clan]] got into an accident as Ali-Alann was escorting them in a [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] that connected the [[Jedi Temple dormitory|nursery]] to the [[Jedi Temple refectory/Legends|dining halls]]. During the ride, all save one of the turbolift car's [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] failed and the horizontal shaft collapsed, leaving the car teetering over the [[Lake level|Lake Level]] several hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] below. In order to keep the children calm while waiting for rescue, Ali-Alann told them stories. The accident was witnessed by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Initiate [[Bant Eerin/Legends|Bant Eerin]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], a former [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] hoping to re-enter the Jedi Order. Recognizing the danger the students were in, Eerin rushed to call for help. Meanwhile, Kenobi climbed up to the shattered shaft and assisted Ali-Alann in removing the Initiates from the car, Honi being the first to be taken out. By then, members of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] had arrived to the scene, as had Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]. The Council members used the Force to hold the car steady while Kenobi took out the [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] one by one and handed them to Jinn. When all of the children were safe, Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] commended them on doing well in the scary situation, saying that the Force had been with them—to which Honi earnestly replied that Ali-Alann had been there as well. The Jedi later found out that the accident had been arranged by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Xanatos]], the failed former apprentice of Jinn who had [[Incident at the Jedi Temple|planned]] to bring down the Jedi Temple. ==Personality and traits== Honi had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and red [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that she wore in braids coiled around her head at the time of the accident. Having been trained in the use of the Force and to control her emotions, Honi—though serious—showed no fear when Obi-Wan Kenobi came to rescue her from the broken turbolift car, trustingly allowing him to carry her on a narrow catwalk hundreds of meters above the Lake Level. Like the other members of her clan, Honi had a great admiration for their caretaker Ali-Alann. ==Behind the scenes== Honi was created by author [[Jude Watson]] and first appeared in the [[2000]] novel [[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple|''The Captive Temple'']], the seventh installment in the [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|''Jedi Apprentice'']] series. The [[2003]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' mentions Honi as an example of a Human female name in its random name generator table.''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Captive Temple]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Honi |fi=Honi }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]]
